hero.title: HD Photos + Datasheets in 10 seconds
hero.subtitle: Paste your product references, GrabSpec finds manufacturer photos and PDF datasheets automatically. Download as ZIP, named to your project convention.
hero.placeholder:
Paste your products, one per line…

Example:
Grohe Eurosmart 33265003
Geberit Sigma 50
Schneider Odace S520702

trust.quote: I was tired of wasting 2 hours per quote searching manufacturer websites for photos and datasheets. So I built GrabSpec.

builtByPro.title: Built by a construction pro
builtByPro.desc: 10 years in Swiss construction — HVAC engineer, BIM coordinator.

madeInGeneva.title: Made in Geneva
madeInGeneva.desc: Developed in Switzerland, hosted in Europe, built for professionals.

noDataStored.title: No data stored
noDataStored.desc: No account, no tracking. Your library stays in your browser.

clientSide.title: 100% client-side
clientSide.desc: Conversions and ZIP exports run in your browser. Total privacy.

trust.socialProof: Already used by engineers, design offices and installers across Switzerland and France

search.title: Smart batch search
search.description: Paste 20 products at once. GrabSpec finds HD photos and technical datasheets from manufacturer websites.

nomenclature.title: Automatic file naming
nomenclature.description: Set up a naming template per project. All your files are renamed automatically on download.

converter.title: 30+ Format Converter
converter.description: PDF, Word, JPG, PNG, WEBP, SVG, AVIF, TIFF, ICO — convert everything for free, client-side, in milliseconds.

rename.title: Semantic Renaming
rename.description: Rename your converted files with a custom name before download. No more 'image(3).png'.

step1.title: Paste your list
step1.description: One product per line: name, reference, or both.

step2.title: GrabSpec searches
step2.description: HD photos and datasheets are found automatically.

step3.title: Download as ZIP
step3.description: All files, named according to your project template.

cta.title: Ready to save time?
cta.subtitle: 3 free searches per day. No credit card required.

finder.title: Product Search
finder.usageTip: Paste one product per line. The free plan counts each product individually, not each submitted list.
finder.placeholder:
Paste your product list, one per line...

Example:
Grohe Eurosmart 33265003
Geberit Sigma 50
Bosch WAX32M40
finder.searchesRemaining: Free plan: {count} product search(es) left today
finder.batchLimitExceeded: This list has {requested} product(s), but you only have {available} search(es) left today.
finder.limitReached: Daily limit reached (3/day). Upgrade to Pro for unlimited searches.
finder.emptyResults: No results found for this product.

library.title: My Library
library.empty: Your library is empty. Run a search to add products.
library.emptyFiltered: No products match the current filters.
library.searchTip: Search your library, then refine with filters to quickly find photos, PDFs, categories, or deleted items.
library.delete_confirm_message: This product will be moved to trash. You can restore it later.
library.permanent_delete_warning: This will permanently delete the product. This action cannot be undone.

nomenclature.title: File naming
nomenclature.help: Define your BIM naming format here. ZIP exports and single-file downloads both reuse the same naming convention.

download.title: Download
download.help: The ZIP uses the active naming template, groups photos and datasheets, and the Excel file acts as a project summary.
download.zipContents: The ZIP will contain: Excel summary + photos + PDF datasheets

converter.title: Document Converter
converter.subtitle: PDF, Word, images — convert for free, no sign-up required.
converter.usageTip: Drop a PDF, DOC, DOCX, or image (JPG, PNG, WEBP). The type is detected automatically.
converter.dropzoneOr: or click to select a file
converter.autoDetect: The conversion type is detected automatically.
converter.secure: Your files are deleted after 1 hour.
converter.clientSide: Local conversion — your files never leave your browser
converter.featureInstantDesc: Images converted client-side, results in milliseconds
converter.featureSecureDesc: Your files are deleted after processing
converter.featureFreeDesc: No limits, no sign-up, no watermark
converter.crossSellCta: Try the Finder — 3 free searches per day →

pricing.title: Simple and transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start for free, upgrade to Pro when you need it.
pricing.usageTip: Choose a monthly or yearly plan, then complete the subscription on Stripe's secure checkout page.
pricing.reassurance: 🇨🇭 Prices in CHF · No commitment · Cancel anytime

pro.name: Pro
pro.description: Pays for itself on day one
features: Unlimited searches — even 100 products at once

business.name: Business
features: Company logo & details on all exports

footer.madeWith: 🇨🇭 Made in Switzerland for construction professionals

metadata.title: GrabSpec — Product photos & datasheets in 10 seconds
metadata.description: Paste a product list, automatically retrieve HD photos and PDF technical datasheets. ZIP export with custom naming convention.
